name: MonFinancier SAS
summary: MonFinancier SAS provides online financial investment consulting services in France. The company offers information regarding asset allocation strategy, fiscal or successoral optimization, and real estate project analysis; and independent analysis on financial markets and raw materials to individual and institutional investors through online. It also develops and distributes investment products, as well as provides online brokerage services. The company was formerly known as Allo Finance and changed its name to MonFinancier SAS in June 2012. MonFinancier SAS was founded in 2003 and is based in Paris, France.
